commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete job clean-bin-index gen-idx --ignore-not-found 2>&1; echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/gen-idx.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/gen-idx.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs -l job-name=gen-idx --prefix --tail=15 2>&1 | head -40'
